sprint.goal: Validate Go kernel→Cloud telemetry E2E pipeline (workspace #60, due Apr 17). KE-2 unblock. Swarm health resolution.

ops-human.task: Fix swarm health P0 (#1186): git worktree prune, /tmp/ PID cleanup, cron collision fix (0 6 * * * and 45 */6 * * * overlap), confirm cron daemon running. 4th cycle unresolved.

ops-human-release.task: After PR #1241 merges: delete v2.9.0 tag, run scripts/prepare-release.sh from correct version-bump commit to re-publish @red-codes/agentguard@2.9.0 to npm.
